name: Ombudsman filing after claim rejection
description: User's health claim was rejected and insurer rejected grievance — needs ombudsman guidance

input.message: Star Health rejected my ₹3 lakh health claim saying my condition was pre-existing. But I disclosed it during proposal. I raised a grievance with them and they rejected that too 20 days ago. What are my next steps? I am in Mumbai.

must_not_contain: there is nothing you can do

notes: User has right to approach Insurance Ombudsman Mumbai (since they are in Mumbai, Star Health's registered office also in relevant zone). Time limit: within 3 months of insurer's final rejection. Documents needed: claim rejection letter, grievance rejection, proposal form with disclosure, medical records. Ombudsman process is free. Award up to ₹50L. Should be empathetic.
